<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v24_individual_edits.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Sahahano Jigi Shrine (Ōtsu Town) | native_name = 佐波波地祇神社(大津町) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Sahahano Jigi Shrine (Ōtsu Town) | coordinates = {{coord|36.833298|140.792309}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Sahahano Jigi Shrine (Ōtsu Town)'''|佐波波地祇神社(大津町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Sahahano Jigi Shrine (Ōtsu Town) | native_name = 佐波波地祇神社(大津町) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Sahahano Jigi Shrine (Ōtsu Town) | coordinates = {{coord|36.833298|140.792309}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Sahahano Jigi Shrine (Ōtsu Town)'''|佐波波地祇神社(大津町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==

<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py--> {{Infobox religious building | name = Sahahano Jigi Shrine (Ōtsu Town) | native_name = 佐波波地祇神社(大津町) | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Sahahano Jigi Shrine (Ōtsu Town) | coordinates = {{coord|36.833298|140.792309}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }}
{{nihongo|'''Sahahano Jigi Shrine (Ōtsu Town)'''|佐波波地祇神社(大津町)}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Hitachi Province]].
== instance of (P31) ==
